info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: darSane lokate lokerBAzArTe RO tu lokayet ' (Slo.40) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'te ete jyotizI uBayataH saMlokete' (E॰brA॰4.15) saMlokete=parasparamavalokayataH
'gfhadvAraM (taTA kurvIta) yaTA na saMloki syAt' (go॰gf॰4.7.13) gfhAntavartijanAdidarSakaM na syAdityAha
'nolUkopyavalokate yadi divA sUryasya kiM dUzaRam' (Bartf0)

'vftiM ca tatra kurvIta yAmuzwro nAvalokayet' (gO0 Da0 sUtravyAKyAyAM mitAkzarAyAmudDftaH pAWaH manO 8239 ityatra tu… na vilokayediti pAWaH sTitaH) vftiM kaRwakAdimayIM taTocCritAM kuryAdyaTodgrIvopi kramelakastAM nAtipaSyedityuktaM Bavati avaSabdo'DovacanaH sAmpratam
'salilezvavalokayata ivAtmAnaM pratizWAnasya' (vikrama0 2) uccEH sTitasya prasannezu vArizu pratibimbamAtmano laBamAnasyetyarTaH
'AtmAnamAtmanyavalokayantam' (ku0 350)
'DanyAsmyanugfhItAsmi devEScApyavalokitA yat…' (mArka0 pu0 1665).. avalokitA=anuDyAtA=anukUlamIkzitA

'apyatra jYAyante putrakftakA vfkzAH jAnAmi jAnAmi avalokitapatrakA ullokayitavyAH samprati saMvfttAH' (pratimA 7) avalokitapatrakA aDonikziptAByAM dfgByAM SakyadarSanAni patrakARi kisalayAni yezAM te taTABUtAH sTAne'vasya prayogaH sTAnetarAM collokayitavyaSabda ucCabdasya aho evamupasargezvavahitaH kaviH
'surapatiguruRAvalokite' (bf0 saM0 562) avalokite=praBAvite
'avalokezu vArIRAM sahasrARi SatAni ca' (BA0 Adi0 21818) samAjagmurityanuzaNgaH

'dIrGikAvalokanagavAkzagatA' (mAla0) aDaH sTitA dIrGikA yato lokayituM SakyA sa dIrGikAvalokano gavAkzastaM gatA tatra sTitA digavalokanaprAsAdaH yatra sTitena sarvA diSo'valokayituM Sakyante sa taTABUtaH
'prezitaste yadA vIra hanUmAnavalokakaH' (rA0 610113) avalokakaH=anvezakaH=spaSaH=caraH
'sajalAni samAKyAni sAvalokanakAni ca' (gfhARi) (mAtsyapu0 14056) avalokanakaM gavAkzaH
'vftiM tatra prakurvIta yAmuzwro na vilokayet' (manu0 8239) aparapArSve na vilokayedityarTaH
'na vilokayan' (go0 gf0 1114) itastato nAnyadavalokayannityarTaH viviDaM lokanaM vilokanam
'vilokya vfdDokzamaDizWitaM tvayA mahAjanaH smeramuKo Bavizyati' (ku0 570)
'atiTijanadidfkzayA vyavalokayataH' (avadA0 jA0 7) vyavalokayata itaScetaSca vilokayataH
'tvanmArgamAlokate' (sA0 da0) tava mArgaM tvayAnusftaM panTAnamAlokate udIkzate ityarTaH AlokitaH kurabakaH kurute vikAsam Alokito niGyAtaH nirvarRitaH kurabakasyAyaM dohada iti kavisampradAyaH
'dUrAd dadarSa nfpatiH sa vanaspatIndramullokyamAnamaDirAjamivAnyavfkzEH' (avadA0 mahAkapijA0 7) ullokyamAnam UrDvaM vilokyamAnam udvIkzyamARam
'apyatra jYAyante putrakftakA vfkzAH jAnAmi jAnAmi avalokitapatrakA ullokayitavyAH samprati saMvfttAH' (pratimA0 7) ullokayitavyA UrDvamutkzipya dfSaM drazwavyAH sTAne kaverudaH prayogaH
